message:
fix(fcp-webhook): prevent panic on DeadLetterQueue push with zero capacity

DeadLetterQueue::push() panicked when max_size was 0 because
events.len() (0) >= max_size (0) triggered events.remove(0) on an
empty vec. Add early return when max_size is 0 — a zero-capacity
DLQ silently discards events. Update test to actually push an event
and verify it's discarded instead of just testing empty state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
